holdings.infoBox: LPRE is an equity ETF with a total of 25 individual holdings. The top holdings are UDR, Inc. stock at 8.24%, Independence Realty Trust at 8.18%, Equity LifeStyle Properties at 7.22%, Healthpeak Properties at 6.59%, and D.R. Horton at 6.58%.

overview.description: The Long Pond Real Estate Select ETF (LPRE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in real estate equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in real estate companies from around the globe the sub-adviser believes are capable of compounding value over time and through different market cycles. LPRE was launched on Apr 4, 2025 and is issued by Long Pond.
